ALL.name: 互联网服务及基础设施

INDUSTRY.name: 互联网服务及基础设施

choices.label: 交易所/市场
choices.llm_hint: Select the listing market. This is not a StockField.

choices.label: 所属行业/概念/板块
choices.llm_hint: Probe theme words as plate_keywords. If a useful plate_code is found, stock_filter can filter within that plate_code.

choices.label: 价格/52周位置/量比/委比/每手价格
choices.llm_hint: Use these for tradability, momentum context, and avoiding illiquid tails.

choices.label: 涨跌幅/振幅/成交量/成交额/换手率
choices.llm_hint: Use days plus sort/filter bounds to discover strong momentum or high liquidity names, e.g. TURNOVER DESCEND or CHANGE_RATE over 20/60 days.

app_screener_catalog.how_to_use_for_theme_discovery: Use market/plate to constrain the universe, then quote and accumulated fields to find liquid, tradable, strong or weak candidates.
app_screener_catalog.name: 行情

choices.label: 市值/流通市值/股本
choices.llm_hint: Use market cap to separate mega-cap anchors from small high-beta satellites.

choices.label: 市盈率（静态/TTM）/市净率/市销率/市现率
choices.llm_hint: Useful for valuation risk flags and relative comparison, not theme discovery alone.

choices.alternate_source: derive from peer universe snapshots/financials; not exposed as current get_stock_filter StockField
choices.label: 估值分位/行业估值分位
choices.llm_hint: Do not pass valuation percentile as stock_filter_specs. Mark it as desired downstream enrichment if needed.

app_screener_catalog.how_to_use_for_theme_discovery: Use valuation as a secondary screen after thematic relevance; do not let cheapness replace theme fit.
app_screener_catalog.name: 估值

choices.label: TTM 分红/股息率
choices.llm_hint: Do not create stock_filter_specs for dividends; request quote snapshot enrichment later.

app_screener_catalog.how_to_use_for_theme_discovery: Dividend data is enrichment, not a get_stock_filter field in this SDK.
app_screener_catalog.name: 分红

choices.alternate_source: derive from pattern/custom_indicator StockFields and K-line enrichment
choices.label: 指标解读
choices.llm_hint: The app-style interpretation layer is not a single OpenAPI enum. Use the specific MA/EMA/KDJ/RSI/MACD/BOLL fields below.

choices.label: MA/EMA 均线形态
choices.llm_hint: Use for trend/momentum probes, e.g. MA_ALIGNMENT_LONG on K_DAY.

choices.label: RSI/KDJ/MACD/BOLL 形态
choices.llm_hint: Use for oscillator and Bollinger-band signals when discovering active candidates.

choices.label: MA/EMA/KDJ/RSI/MACD/BOLL 自定义指标比较
choices.llm_hint: Use only when a simple pattern field is insufficient.

app_screener_catalog.how_to_use_for_theme_discovery: Use technical filters to discover trend candidates or confirm that a theme is active; avoid using them as the only reason a name belongs to a theme.
app_screener_catalog.name: 技术

choices.label: 利润/收入/利润率/ROE/ROIC/现金流/资产负债/增长率/EPS
choices.llm_hint: Useful probes: revenue growth, gross margin, ROE/ROIC, operating cash flow, debt ratio. Exact numbers still need downstream SEC/fundamental validation.

app_screener_catalog.how_to_use_for_theme_discovery: Use fundamentals to filter quality and growth after the theme map is drafted.
app_screener_catalog.name: 财务

choices.label: 评级/目标价/一致预期/盈利修正
choices.llm_hint: Do not invent these facts. Mark as needed evidence if useful.

app_screener_catalog.how_to_use_for_theme_discovery: Analyst ratings/revisions are not exposed by get_stock_filter here.
app_screener_catalog.name: 分析

choices.label: 期权活跃度/IV/到期日/Put-Call context
choices.llm_hint: Use later to assess tradability and income-strategy readiness, not as stock_filter_specs.

app_screener_catalog.how_to_use_for_theme_discovery: Options are not stock_filter fields. Use option-chain/surface enrichment after candidate discovery.
app_screener_catalog.name: 期权

accumulate.description: Accumulated market fields over a day window.
Accumulated market fields over a day window.

request_limits.note: Futu documents stock-filter pagination and request-rate limits; callers should rate-limit probes.
Futu documents stock-filter pagination and request-rate limits; callers should rate-limit probes.
